subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — a 30-minute call next week sounds like a good starting point.

I have openings on Wednesday April 30 (14:00–16:00 UTC) and Thursday May 1 (10:00–12:00 UTC). Either should work for a focused discussion. Which slot is best for you?

On the CTO and VP of Engineering direct contact details — I can't share those externally, I'm afraid. Internal contact information stays internal. The best approach is to keep the conversation here for now, and I can make sure the right people are looped in at the right stage.

Thanks and talk soon!
